name: Potato Skins with Black Beans and Salsa
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Halve baked potatoes lengthwise; scoop out pulp, leaving about a quarter-inch of pulp attached to the skin (avoid breaking the skin). Place potato skins on a large baking sheet, skin-side down; bake for 5 minutes.
3. Fill each potato skin with one tablespoon of black bean dip and one tablespoon of nacho dip. Return to oven; bake for another 10 minutes. Remove from oven; let cool for 5 minutes.
4. Top each potato with one tablespoon of salsa and one tablespoon of sour cream. Garnish with cilantro if desired. Serve hot.
Makes 12 servings. Preparation time: About 20 minutes. Baking time: About 15 minutes. Standing time: About 5 minutes.
